pr.title: Record: 0.0214 bpb - Low Eval-Time Memory Regime: Packed Training N-gram Artifact + Learned Gate (No Phrase Cache)

output.summary: Packed order-2..9 training n-gram cache plus a learned neural/ngram gate and dropped the mixer/phrase cache to keep the causal eval path lean.
techniques: Packed order-2..9 n-gram cache inside the artifact
Learned gate blending neural and n-gram experts
Removed logistic mixer and phrase cache for single-pass causal eval
